findings: No current-run pointer file; monitor receives run_id and base_dir as CLI args. stampede.sh:1060
Monitor cannot auto-discover runs; must be co-launched by the launcher. stampede.sh:1059-1061
Metaswarm commanders/ structure (swarm-state.json, child-agents.jsonl, atoms/, logs/) fully written before tmux session created. stampede.sh:612-614,747-860
fleet.json, state.json, collab/protocol.json all written before monitor starts — metadata available immediately. stampede.sh:656-865
PID capture has sleep 5 after pane creation (stampede.sh:1165) plus find_leaf_pid tree walk. PID files unavailable for ~5-15s after monitor starts. stampede.sh:1165-1192
Race limited to PID liveness data; task/fleet/state metadata is race-free at monitor start.
Fallback: if stampede-monitor.sh missing, launcher uses watch-based fallback reading pids dir. stampede.sh:1063-1101
